ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED( StageName ), ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Prospect"), NOT(ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(StageName), "Prospect")), $Profile.Name <> 'SW SalesOps Extended', $Profile.Name <> 'SW SalesOps', $Profile.Name <> 'System Administrator', OR( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Renewal', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Enterprise' ), ISPICKVAL(Type, "New Sale") )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: An opp can not be moved back to 10% once it was moved to 25%
